tweets.title: India Plans First-Ever Border Fence Through the Sundarbans India is planning to construct its first border fence through the Sundarbans along the Bangladesh frontier, covering approximately 90 km in West Bengal. According to reports, the BSF has begun feasibility and technical studies for the project. The challenging riverine border is currently secured through Floating Border Outposts, marine patrols, and surveillance, with plans to further strengthen security infrastructure. The proposed fencing faces logistical and environmental challenges, with 71 km of the border adjoining the protected Sundarbans Wildlife Sanctuary, where construction is restricted. Authorities have assured compensation and rehabilitation to affected residents if land acquisition is required. The project is currently in the planning and assessment stage, with no construction timeline officially announced.
tweets.content:
India Plans First-Ever Border Fence Through the Sundarbans

India is planning to construct its first border fence through the Sundarbans along the Bangladesh frontier, covering approximately 90 km in West Bengal.

According to reports, the BSF has begun feasibility and technical studies for the project. The challenging riverine border is currently secured through Floating Border Outposts, marine patrols, and surveillance, with plans to further strengthen security infrastructure.

The proposed fencing faces logistical and environmental challenges, with 71 km of the border adjoining the protected Sundarbans Wildlife Sanctuary, where construction is restricted. Authorities have assured compensation and rehabilitation to affected residents if land acquisition is required.

The project is currently in the planning and assessment stage, with no construction timeline officially announced.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: Russia carried out one of its largest ballistic missile attacks on Kyiv 40+ missiles of various types, most aimed at the capital, plus 120 attack drones - Zelensky ✅ 120 UAVs and 40 ballistic missiles to rock the world’s most defended capital backed by NATO’s best equipment, intel, and systems like Patriot, IRIS-T, NASAMS ✅ If Kyiv had more Patriot/IRIS-T-tier batteries, it would take Russia more missiles to saturate the same defenses but it would have eventually saturated them anyways. ✅ This is what a deterrence-focused rocket force actually buys you and this is where India needs to invest “right now”.
tweets.content:
Russia carried out one of its largest ballistic missile attacks on Kyiv 40+ missiles of various types, most aimed at the capital, plus 120 attack drones - Zelensky

✅ 120 UAVs and 40 ballistic missiles to rock the world’s most defended capital backed by NATO’s best equipment, intel, and systems like Patriot, IRIS-T, NASAMS
✅ If Kyiv had more Patriot/IRIS-T-tier batteries, it would take Russia more missiles to saturate the same defenses but it would have eventually saturated them anyways.
✅ This is what a deterrence-focused rocket force actually buys you and this is where India needs to invest “right now”.

tweets.title: BREAKING: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran After Deadly Attack on American Troops The United States has launched a new round of airstrikes against Iran after two U.S. service members were killed and another reported missing following an Iranian attack in Jordan. According to U.S. Central Command, the strikes were ordered by President Donald Trump and targeted IRGC military infrastructure, logistics, surveillance sites, underground weapons storage, and maritime capabilities to degrade Iran's ability to threaten shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian media reported a U.S. strike near Sirik in southern Iran but claimed there were no casualties or major infrastructure damage.
tweets.content:
BREAKING: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran After Deadly Attack on American Troops

The United States has launched a new round of airstrikes against Iran after two U.S. service members were killed and another reported missing following an Iranian attack in Jordan.

According to U.S. Central Command, the strikes were ordered by President Donald Trump and targeted IRGC military infrastructure, logistics, surveillance sites, underground weapons storage, and maritime capabilities to degrade Iran's ability to threaten shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

Iranian media reported a U.S. strike near Sirik in southern Iran but claimed there were no casualties or major infrastructure damage.

tweets.title: A humongous rescue effort was launched by the Indian Army, J&K Police, and Central Armed Police Forces. The upper regions of the valley have been hit by severe floods. It might sound routine for the armed forces to everyone, but the sheer coordination required to execute such an operation within hours is something that serves as a masterclass in management. The troops simultaneously make their own units safe while continuing to rescue civilians. Alongside this, search operations are also launched for people reported missing due to the severity of the floods.
tweets.content:
A humongous rescue effort was launched by the Indian Army, J&K Police, and Central Armed Police Forces.

The upper regions of the valley have been hit by severe floods.

It might sound routine for the armed forces to everyone, but the sheer coordination required to execute such an operation within hours is something that serves as a masterclass in management.

The troops simultaneously make their own units safe while continuing to rescue civilians. Alongside this, search operations are also launched for people reported missing due to the severity of the floods.

tweets.title: Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief: 18th Jul 2026: - We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East - ⁠Follow us for daily Brief ● IDF forces identified and struck a Hezbollah terrorist cell that had been operating drones and taking cover near IDF soldiers in the Security Zone. ● IRGC said they carried out a missile & drone attack on fighter shelters and a large aircraft parking apron at a US base in Azraq, Jordan, destroying at least 2 fighter jets and 3 other US aircraft. ● Kuwait Petroleum Corporation said one of its oil facilities was hit by repeated Iranian attacks, causing significant damage and injuring several workers. ● US attacks overnight damaged a bridge on the Bandar Abbas-Hajjiabad axis and caused destruction at four points along major roadways in Hormozgan province. ● Iran suspended its commitments under the Islamabad MoU with the US after Washington "violated all of its obligations" under the agreement. END OF THE BRIEF
tweets.content:
Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief:
18th Jul 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● IDF forces identified and struck a Hezbollah terrorist cell that had been operating drones and taking cover near IDF soldiers in the Security Zone.

● IRGC said they carried out a missile & drone attack on fighter shelters and a large aircraft parking apron at a US base in Azraq, Jordan, destroying at least 2 fighter jets and 3 other US aircraft.

● Kuwait Petroleum Corporation said one of its oil facilities was hit by repeated Iranian attacks, causing significant damage and injuring several workers.

● US attacks overnight damaged a bridge on the Bandar Abbas-Hajjiabad axis and caused destruction at four points along major roadways in Hormozgan province.

● Iran suspended its commitments under the Islamabad MoU with the US after Washington "violated all of its obligations" under the agreement.

END OF THE BRIEF

Netram Defence Review (@NetramDefence)

Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief:
17th Jul 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● US forces conducted a precision airstrike that destroyed the maritime control tower at Iran’s Chabahar port this morning. This targets Iran's only major deep-
water Indian Ocean port - important for trade with India and as a route for landlocked Afghanistan.

● IRGC issued a direct call to the people and armed forces of Jordan, urging them to fulfill what it describes as a "divine duty" by targeting US military personnel and assets stationed on Jordanian soil.

● UKMTO reported an incident 65NM south of Al Mukalla, Yemen. The vessel was boarded by unauthorized personnel whilst transiting east in the Gulf of Aden.

● IRGC said its missiles struck a US command center in Syria's Al-Tanf district, killing many US soldiers in retaliation for the earlier US attacks. However, CENTCOM
denies this claim.

● Power generation and water desalination plants in Kuwait had been hit in an Iranian attack, causing a fire and damaging facilities and several power generation units.

● IRGC's Aerospace Force claimed responsibility for a heavy, surprise bombardment utilizing missiles and drones against the massive US airbase at al-Udeid in Qatar.

END OF THE BRIEF

— https://nitter.net/NetramDefence/status/2078144985879511341#m

tweets.title: Thank you Solar group for investing and helping Skyroot do what it has done today 🚀
tweets.content:
Thank you Solar group for investing and helping Skyroot do what it has done today 🚀

ANI (@ANI)

Manish Nuwal, Managing Director & CEO, Solar Industries India Ltd, Propelling Partnerships says, "Watching Vikram-1 lift off and successfully achieve its intended trajectory is an incredibly proud and emotional moment for all of us. As early investors, we placed our trust in the vision, determination, and leadership of co-founders, Pawan Kumar Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka. Our decision to invest in Skyroot was driven by a larger purpose: to contribute to building a strong indigenous space ecosystem with long-term strategic significance for India. As Strategic Supply Chain Partners, seeing our specialized propellant performing to its desired parameters under the extreme stress of an orbital launch validates our team's world-class engineering, precision chemistry, and manufacturing capabilities. Solar Group has built the largest and most integrated manufacturing facility in the private sector for the defence and space applications in India, and is actively enhancing its capabilities and expanding its manufacturing capacities to meet the growing requirements of the Indian space sector."

(File photo)

— https://nitter.net/ANI/status/2078502386193351018#m

tweets.title: “We feel proud that he made the ultimate sacrifice for the country. My resolve is to become a good officer, serve the country, and take revenge on the enemies. I feel good knowing he did something truly right... It is a matter of pride.” —Fasal Iqbal, speaking to ANI as the mortal remains of his father, Assam Rifles Havildar Mohd Iqbal Havildar Mohd Iqbal recently made the supreme sacrifice in the line of duty in Nagaland's Chumoukedima district. During an operational movement near Shokhuvi, his Assam Rifles vehicle was targeted by a suspected IED in a terrorist attack. The explosion claimed his life and injured five others, including four security personnel.

Havildar Mohd Iqbal recently made the supreme sacrifice in the line of duty in Nagaland's Chumoukedima district.

During an operational movement near Shokhuvi, his Assam Rifles vehicle was targeted by a suspected IED in a terrorist attack. The explosion claimed his life and injured five others, including four security personnel.

tweets.title: Jio's 1,600-Satellite LEO Constellation Cleared by IN-SPACe, Designed to Support Military Payloads India's space regulator, IN-SPACe, officially approved Reliance Jio's proposal to deploy around 1,600 low-Earth orbit (LEO) satellites. Jointly evaluated with ISRO and the Department of Telecommunications, the homegrown system boasts a massive capacity of up to 5 terabits per second (Tbps) and is designed to host defense payloads for national security.
tweets.content:
Jio's 1,600-Satellite LEO Constellation Cleared by IN-SPACe, Designed to Support Military Payloads

India's space regulator, IN-SPACe, officially approved Reliance Jio's proposal to deploy around 1,600 low-Earth orbit (LEO) satellites. Jointly evaluated with ISRO and the Department of Telecommunications, the homegrown system boasts a massive capacity of up to 5 terabits per second (Tbps) and is designed to host defense payloads for national security.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: Skyroot's Vikram-1 Showcases India's Private Space Leap Skyroot Aerospace's Vikram-1 has demonstrated India's rapidly expanding private-sector launch capability, successfully reaching orbit and proving India's growing role in the global commercial space industry. Vikram-1 strengthens the nation's ability to provide indigenous orbital launch services for domestic and international satellite customers.
tweets.content:
Skyroot's Vikram-1 Showcases India's Private Space Leap

Skyroot Aerospace's Vikram-1 has demonstrated India's rapidly expanding private-sector launch capability, successfully reaching orbit and proving India's growing role in the global commercial space industry.

Vikram-1 strengthens the nation's ability to provide indigenous orbital launch services for domestic and international satellite customers.

tweets.title: BREAKING: PoK Neither "Azad" Nor "Disputed" But "Occupied": Local Leader At Rally Amid ongoing unrest in Pakistan-occupied Jammu & Kashmir (PoJK), protest leader Sardar Aman Khan declared at a massive rally in Rawalakot that the region is "neither Azad nor disputed, but occupied." The protests have continued for over 40 days, with demonstrators alleging shortages of food and medicines, internet blackouts, and excessive use of force by Pakistani authorities. India's Ministry of External Affairs has accused Pakistan of systematic exploitation, denial of fundamental rights, and a violent crackdown on civilians in PoJK. The situation remains tense, with protests continuing across the region.
tweets.content:
BREAKING: PoK Neither "Azad" Nor "Disputed" But "Occupied": Local Leader At Rally

Amid ongoing unrest in Pakistan-occupied Jammu & Kashmir (PoJK), protest leader Sardar Aman Khan declared at a massive rally in Rawalakot that the region is "neither Azad nor disputed, but occupied."

The protests have continued for over 40 days, with demonstrators alleging shortages of food and medicines, internet blackouts, and excessive use of force by Pakistani authorities.

India's Ministry of External Affairs has accused Pakistan of systematic exploitation, denial of fundamental rights, and a violent crackdown on civilians in PoJK.

The situation remains tense, with protests continuing across the region.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: BREAKING: Infiltration Bid Foiled Along LoC in J&K's Rajouri Indian Army troops opened fire after detecting suspicious movement near the Line of Control (LoC) in the Tarkundi sector of Rajouri on Friday night, triggering an exchange of small-arms fire with Pakistani positions. The firing reportedly lasted around 90 minutes. No casualties have been reported. A search operation is underway to determine whether any infiltration attempt succeeded, while security forces have placed the area under heightened surveillance.
tweets.content:
BREAKING: Infiltration Bid Foiled Along LoC in J&K's Rajouri

Indian Army troops opened fire after detecting suspicious movement near the Line of Control (LoC) in the Tarkundi sector of Rajouri on Friday night, triggering an exchange of small-arms fire with Pakistani positions.

The firing reportedly lasted around 90 minutes. No casualties have been reported.

A search operation is underway to determine whether any infiltration attempt succeeded, while security forces have placed the area under heightened surveillance.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: RT by @sidhant: Our vibrant community is a strong pillar of the India–Saudi Arabia partnership. I'm incredibly grateful for the immense love, affection and support I received from the Indian community in Saudi Arabia throughout my tenure. Thank you everyone for making this journey so memorable!
tweets.content:
Our vibrant community is a strong pillar of the India–Saudi Arabia partnership.

I'm incredibly grateful for the immense love, affection and support I received from the Indian community in Saudi Arabia throughout my tenure. Thank you everyone for making this journey so memorable!

India in Saudi Arabia (@IndianEmbRiyadh)

The Indian community in Saudi Arabia came together to bid a grand farewell to Ambassador Dr. Suhel Khan.

Led by the All India Steering Committee, representatives of diverse Indian community organizations and groups felicitated the Ambassador and expressed their appreciation for his dedicated service.

The Ambassador commended the community's spirit of volunteerism, its efforts to promote Indian culture, and its contribution to strengthening India–Saudi Arabia relations. He also appreciated the Indian business community for its important role in deepening economic ties with Saudi Arabia. He assured everyone that the Embassy would continue to serve the community with utmost commitment and dedication.

@MEAIndia
@diaspora_india

— https://nitter.net/IndianEmbRiyadh/status/2078403418381488453#m

tweets.title: Kathua Railway Station Renamed to Honour Kirti Chakra Awardee Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary Kathua Railway Station has been renamed "Martyr Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary Kathua Railway Station" in honour of Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary of the 7/11 Gorkha Rifles, who made the supreme sacrifice during an anti-terror operation in Assam in 2008. Captain Choudhary was posthumously awarded the Kirti Chakra, India's second-highest peacetime gallantry award, and was also a recipient of the Sena Medal for his exceptional bravery. More than a symbolic gesture, the renaming stands as a lasting tribute to a soldier whose courage and sacrifice will continue to inspire generations.
tweets.content:
Kathua Railway Station Renamed to Honour Kirti Chakra Awardee Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary

Kathua Railway Station has been renamed "Martyr Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary Kathua Railway Station" in honour of Captain Sunil Kumar Choudhary of the 7/11 Gorkha Rifles, who made the supreme sacrifice during an anti-terror operation in Assam in 2008.

Captain Choudhary was posthumously awarded the Kirti Chakra, India's second-highest peacetime gallantry award, and was also a recipient of the Sena Medal for his exceptional bravery.

More than a symbolic gesture, the renaming stands as a lasting tribute to a soldier whose courage and sacrifice will continue to inspire generations.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: BREAKING: IRGC Claims Two Oil Tankers Hit Mines in Strait of Hormuz; U.S. Rejects Allegation Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims two oil tankers exploded after striking mines in the Strait of Hormuz, alleging the minefield was created through "deceptive American intelligence." The IRGC also claims it stopped four vessels attempting to transit the Strait during a combined missile and drone operation. U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has categorically denied the claims, stating: "Like most IRGC claims, this is false".
tweets.content:
BREAKING: IRGC Claims Two Oil Tankers Hit Mines in Strait of Hormuz; U.S. Rejects Allegation

Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims two oil tankers exploded after striking mines in the Strait of Hormuz, alleging the minefield was created through "deceptive American intelligence."

The IRGC also claims it stopped four vessels attempting to transit the Strait during a combined missile and drone operation.

U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has categorically denied the claims, stating: "Like most IRGC claims, this is false".

tweets.title: RT by @OsintTV: PAF now forced to transfer atleast two JF-17B Block 2 trainers to Azerbaijan, from own PAF fleet/inventory due to PACs failure to produce more JF-17Bs. This has caused further strain on PAFs meagre training resources.
tweets.content:
PAF now forced to transfer atleast two JF-17B Block 2 trainers to Azerbaijan, from own PAF fleet/inventory due to PACs failure to produce more JF-17Bs.

This has caused further strain on PAFs meagre training resources.

WLVN (@TheLegateIN)

Pakistan Air Force has been forced to divert several JF-17 Block-III and JF-17B fighters to Azerbaijan straight from its own inventory — a fallout of PAC’s sluggish production, poor WS-13B engine output, and Russia reportedly haltening RD-93 supplies. A major embarrassment for PAF flagship program.
Nigerian JF-17s were also 2nd hand deliveries from PAF inventory.

— https://nitter.net/TheLegateIN/status/1989003198309580917#m
tweets.author: @TheLegateIN

tweets.title: Israel Says It Will Retain Troops in Security Zones Across Gaza, Lebanon & Syria Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz told U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth that Israel is determined to maintain military forces in its security zones inside Gaza, southern Lebanon, and Syria, saying the deployments are essential to protect Israel's borders from security threats. The statement comes days after reports that U.S. President Donald Trump urged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to withdraw Israeli forces from Syria and Lebanon.
tweets.content:
Israel Says It Will Retain Troops in Security Zones Across Gaza, Lebanon & Syria

Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz told U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth that Israel is determined to maintain military forces in its security zones inside Gaza, southern Lebanon, and Syria, saying the deployments are essential to protect Israel's borders from security threats.

The statement comes days after reports that U.S. President Donald Trump urged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to withdraw Israeli forces from Syria and Lebanon.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: India’s first privately developed launch vehicle takes to the space today. India is only the 3rd country to do so after US, China.
tweets.content:
India’s first privately developed launch vehicle takes to the space today. India is only the 3rd country to do so after US, China.

Narendra Modi (@narendramodi)

A historic new frontier for India’s space journey!

At 11:30 AM today, Skyroot Aerospace will undertake the maiden orbital launch of Vikram-1, India’s first privately developed launch vehicle.

This four-stage rocket is designed to provide rapid and on-demand launch services. This mission highlights the talent, determination and entrepreneurial spirit of our youth. It also shows how our space-sector reforms are unlocking new opportunities for innovation and enterprise.

My best wishes to the entire Skyroot Aerospace team for a successful launch. May Vikram-1 soar high, create history and inspire a generation of innovators.

I urge all Indians, especially my young friends, to follow this historic mission and join in wishing Team Skyroot success using #IndiaWithVikram1.

@SkyrootA

— https://nitter.net/narendramodi/status/2078306459893563667#m
tweets.author: @sidhant

As per orders of Hon’ble High Court and on expert medical advise due to the deteriorating health condition of Sh. Sonam Wangchuk, he has been shifted to the hospital for essential medical care.

tweets.title: RT by @OsintTV: Jammu & Kashmir Cyber Crime Coordination Centre (JK4C) has been established under the overall superintendence and control of the DGP, J&K, marking a significant step towards strengthening the fight against cyber crime across the Union Territory. The dedicated coordination centre will enhance cyber threat detection, improve inter-agency coordination, strengthen cyber investigations, and bolster the overall cyber security framework. A welcome and much-needed initiative in an era where cyber threats are evolving rapidly. This move is expected to significantly improve the prevention, investigation, and prosecution of cyber crimes in Jammu & Kashmir. @JmuKmrPolice
tweets.content:
Jammu & Kashmir Cyber Crime Coordination Centre (JK4C) has been established under the overall superintendence and control of the DGP, J&K, marking a significant step towards strengthening the fight against cyber crime across the Union Territory.

The dedicated coordination centre will enhance cyber threat detection, improve inter-agency coordination, strengthen cyber investigations, and bolster the overall cyber security framework.

A welcome and much-needed initiative in an era where cyber threats are evolving rapidly. This move is expected to significantly improve the prevention, investigation, and prosecution of cyber crimes in Jammu & Kashmir.

@JmuKmrPolice
tweets.author: @MikeLimaBravo12

tweets.title: Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief: 17th Jul 2026: - We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East - ⁠Follow us for daily Brief ● US forces conducted a precision airstrike that destroyed the maritime control tower at Iran’s Chabahar port this morning. This targets Iran's only major deep- water Indian Ocean port - important for trade with India and as a route for landlocked Afghanistan. ● IRGC issued a direct call to the people and armed forces of Jordan, urging them to fulfill what it describes as a "divine duty" by targeting US military personnel and assets stationed on Jordanian soil. ● UKMTO reported an incident 65NM south of Al Mukalla, Yemen. The vessel was boarded by unauthorized personnel whilst transiting east in the Gulf of Aden. ● IRGC said its missiles struck a US command center in Syria's Al-Tanf district, killing many US soldiers in retaliation for the earlier US attacks. However, CENTCOM denies this claim. ● Power generation and water desalination plants in Kuwait had been hit in an Iranian attack, causing a fire and damaging facilities and several power generation units. ● IRGC's Aerospace Force claimed responsibility for a heavy, surprise bombardment utilizing missiles and drones against the massive US airbase at al-Udeid in Qatar. END OF THE BRIEF
tweets.content:
Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief:
17th Jul 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● US forces conducted a precision airstrike that destroyed the maritime control tower at Iran’s Chabahar port this morning. This targets Iran's only major deep-
water Indian Ocean port - important for trade with India and as a route for landlocked Afghanistan.

● IRGC issued a direct call to the people and armed forces of Jordan, urging them to fulfill what it describes as a "divine duty" by targeting US military personnel and assets stationed on Jordanian soil.

● UKMTO reported an incident 65NM south of Al Mukalla, Yemen. The vessel was boarded by unauthorized personnel whilst transiting east in the Gulf of Aden.

● IRGC said its missiles struck a US command center in Syria's Al-Tanf district, killing many US soldiers in retaliation for the earlier US attacks. However, CENTCOM
denies this claim.

● Power generation and water desalination plants in Kuwait had been hit in an Iranian attack, causing a fire and damaging facilities and several power generation units.

● IRGC's Aerospace Force claimed responsibility for a heavy, surprise bombardment utilizing missiles and drones against the massive US airbase at al-Udeid in Qatar.

END OF THE BRIEF

Netram Defence Review (@NetramDefence)

Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief:
16th Jul 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz an inviolable red line today, warning that any US strikes on Iranian infrastructure, including the power plants and bridges, would trigger retaliatory strikes against critical infrastructure across the Gulf region.
● The IDF eliminated 3 armed Hezbollah terrorists, who were carrying combat equipment, in the area of Beit Yahoun which is located within the Security Zone in southern Lebanon.

● Iran’s army said on Thursday that its drones targeted US radar systems, Patriot air defenses and fuel storage at Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait, as well as communications and radar systems at Isa Air Base in Bahrain.

● Nine vessels crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday, down from 13 on Tuesday, with most
using the Iranian route.

● India ordered shipowners and operators not to deploy Indian seafarers on vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz until further notice.

● Iraq suspended its crude oil loading at all terminals, following a drone strike, which has been attributed to Iranian-backed non-state actors in country, on a tanker at the Basra Oil Terminal.

END OF THE BRIEF

— https://nitter.net/NetramDefence/status/2077814992276193695#m

In the backdrop of recent surge in terrorist activities against Police and vehicle borne suicide bombing in Bannu District, in which Indian Proxy Fitna Al-Khwarij targeted Law Enforcement Agencies and innocent civilians, Security Forces have initiated extensive joint intelligence-based operations to hunt the perpetrators of these heinous attacks and their support infrastructure.

Weapons and ammunition have also been recovered from killed Khwarij, who remained actively involved in numerous terrorist activities and killing of innocent civilians.

The operations in the area would continue and perpetrators of these henious and cowardly act will be brought to justice, as the relentless Counter Terrorism campaign under vision “Azm-e-Istehkam” (as approved by the Federal Apex Committee on National Action Plan) by Security Forces and Law Enforcement Agencies of Pakistan will continue at full pace to wipe out the menace of foreign-sponsored and supported terrorism from the country.

tweets.title: RT by @NetramDefence: American airstrikes have just destroyed the maritime control tower at Iran's Chabahar Port, a critical infrastructure and trade hub heavily developed and funded by India. India has poured massive resources into Chabahar over the last decade. Over $500 million. The breakdown: ▪️ $120M direct investment for operations (paid in full) ▪️ $250M credit line for port infrastructure ▪️ $134M spent on the connecting Zaranj-Delaram highway Chabahar is not just a commercial port; it is India's primary gateway to Afghanistan and Central Asia, purposefully designed to bypass Pakistan entirely. As a cornerstone of the International North-South Transport Corridor (INSTC), its impairment chokes off India's strategic trade access.
tweets.content:
American airstrikes have just destroyed the maritime control tower at Iran's Chabahar Port, a critical infrastructure and trade hub heavily developed and funded by India.

India has poured massive resources into Chabahar over the last decade. Over $500 million.
The breakdown:
▪️ $120M direct investment for operations (paid in full)
▪️ $250M credit line for port infrastructure
▪️ $134M spent on the connecting Zaranj-Delaram highway

Chabahar is not just a commercial port; it is India's primary gateway to Afghanistan and Central Asia, purposefully designed to bypass Pakistan entirely. As a cornerstone of the International North-South Transport Corridor (INSTC), its impairment chokes off India's strategic trade access.

Sidhant Sibal (@sidhant)

US Defence Secy posts a picture of destroyed maritime tower of Chabahar port in Iran.

— https://nitter.net/sidhant/status/2078003301757726836#m

tweets.title: BREAKING: Gujarat ATS has foiled an active time bomb plot, arresting 5 Jaish-e-Mohammed (JeM) operatives across the state. Here is a breakdown of the ongoing operation: The Plot: One of the arrested operatives had advanced explosive knowledge and was captured right before completing a live time bomb. A previous attempt by the group to test a crude explosive had failed. The Network: These arrests bring the total number of captured operatives to 18. The sleeper cell, operating under "Darul Islam Gujarat Jaish-e-Mohammed," was actively targeting vulnerable local youth for recruitment. The Backing: Interrogations revealed the module was receiving direct financial support and instructions from handlers based in Pakistan. The Evidence: Authorities have seized over 250 radicalized digital files, technical manuals, and translated texts used by the module. Central and state intelligence agencies are currently conducting multi-state searches to map the financial pathways and recover any hidden weapon caches.
tweets.content:
BREAKING: Gujarat ATS has foiled an active time bomb plot, arresting 5 Jaish-e-Mohammed (JeM) operatives across the state.

Here is a breakdown of the ongoing operation:

The Plot: One of the arrested operatives had advanced explosive knowledge and was captured right before completing a live time bomb. A previous attempt by the group to test a crude explosive had failed.

The Network: These arrests bring the total number of captured operatives to 18. The sleeper cell, operating under "Darul Islam Gujarat Jaish-e-Mohammed," was actively targeting vulnerable local youth for recruitment.

The Backing: Interrogations revealed the module was receiving direct financial support and instructions from handlers based in Pakistan.

The Evidence: Authorities have seized over 250 radicalized digital files, technical manuals, and translated texts used by the module.

Central and state intelligence agencies are currently conducting multi-state searches to map the financial pathways and recover any hidden weapon caches.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence

tweets.title: BREAKING: Saudi Arabia Rolls Over $3 Billion Loan to Pakistan Saudi Arabia has extended (rolled over) a $3 billion loan to Pakistan, providing a crucial financial lifeline as Islamabad works to meet IMF programme conditions and maintain its foreign exchange reserves. The loan, originally extended in April 2026, was used by Pakistan to repay debt owed to the United Arab Emirates during the Iran conflict. The rollover eases immediate financial pressure on Pakistan but does not constitute new funding. It helps sustain the country's external financing position under the ongoing IMF programme.
tweets.content:
BREAKING: Saudi Arabia Rolls Over $3 Billion Loan to Pakistan

Saudi Arabia has extended (rolled over) a $3 billion loan to Pakistan, providing a crucial financial lifeline as Islamabad works to meet IMF programme conditions and maintain its foreign exchange reserves.

The loan, originally extended in April 2026, was used by Pakistan to repay debt owed to the United Arab Emirates during the Iran conflict.

The rollover eases immediate financial pressure on Pakistan but does not constitute new funding. It helps sustain the country's external financing position under the ongoing IMF programme.
tweets.author: @NetramDefence
